title: Lønstrup Mølle
summary: Lønstrup Mølle is a former smock mill in Lønstrup on the west coast of North Jutlandic Island in the north-west of Denmark. It was decommissioned in the beginning of the 20th century and has been converted into a private home. The sails broke off in the 1990s.
